content: At a private gathering hosted by Bezos, the author notes that even the world’s richest people take for granted what is routinely free and unimportant. The piece juxtaposes this casual attitude with a 2007 film scene where an oil magnate kills a rival, then sells him off a valuable oil field that the magnate no longer needs. The narrative underscores how wealth can be both disposable and intensely transactional.

title: [开源] Proteus - 一个用于管理和无缝切换 Claude Code Provider 的 CLI 工具，支持并行隔离会话
content: Proteus is an open‑source CLI tool written in Go that simplifies managing multiple Claude Code providers such as Anthropic, DeepSeek, or GLM. Users switch the default provider with `proteus switch <provider>`, automatically updating global configuration. Parallel, isolated sessions are launched via `proteus launch <profile>`, keeping settings separate and enabling concurrent use of different providers. A single YAML file manages tokens and settings, with validation and automatic sync of shared options. Install with Homebrew and configure under `~/.config/proteus/providers.yaml`.

title: The New Space Race: NASA, Artemis, and the Race to the Moon

Isaacman stresses rebuilding core capabilities and focusing strategy to compete in a new, more competitive space race, while noting the importance of public‑private partnerships.

title: 由于数据中心电力需求激增 美国电力公司 AEP 将资本计划提高至 780 亿美元
content: US electric utility AEP has raised its five‑year capital investment plan to $78 billion, an 8 % increase over three months ago. The hike is driven by transmission upgrades in the PJM and SPP regions and a new natural‑gas power project in Indiana. A surge in data‑center construction—largely by major tech firms supporting AI—has boosted electricity demand, prompting AEP to expand generation and transmission infrastructure accordingly.

title: 曝三星、SK 海力士、美光 DDR6 内存研发正式启动，速度有望达 DDR5 两倍
content: Samsung, SK Hynix, and Micron have begun development of DDR6 memory, even though JEDEC standards are not finalized. Manufacturers are preparing substrates and aiming to produce test samples. DDR6 is expected to reach up to 17.6 Gbps, roughly twice the projected DDR5 speed, with commercial availability slated for 2028–2029. Last year JEDEC released the LPDDR6 standard, which introduces a half-width x6 sub‑channel mode that could enable 512 GB system memory.
The stock market last experienced a similarly sharp split at the end of 2020.

title: 金建希案法官凌晨身亡，初步调查结果来了 | 原文
content: A Korean judge, Lee Sun‑woo, who presided over the second‑instance trial in former first lady Kim Ji‑hye’s stock‑price manipulation case, was found dead inside the courthouse early on June 6. An initial investigation indicates no evidence of foul play and that he likely fell to his death. Police are still investigating the precise cause. Kim was previously sentenced to four years’ prison and a 500‑million‑won fine, with her appeal pending.

title: 人均20元、日销近千杯，手作酸奶火了
content: A new wave of handcrafted yogurt shops sells drinks for about ¥20 per cup, opening rapidly across China. These brands combine lower rents, small storefronts, and a focus on local ingredients, visible “hand‑made” preparation, and simple Chinese‑style interiors that encourage social sharing. They shift from the previous “health‑premium” model to everyday affordability, offering a broader dessert range that attracts repeat visits. Yet the model’s attractiveness may erode as more competitors adopt the same inexpensive, experiential approach.

The shift signals a shift from free‑model competition to monetization strategies.

title: 从源码到架构：React useActionState 深度剖析
content: React 19’s `useActionState` abstracts form and other async state changes into a single hook that returns `[state, dispatch, isPending]`. Internally it composes three hooks—state, pending, and action queue—using a circular linked list for O(1) queue operations and a thenable protocol for flexible async handling. `dispatch` enqueues actions, runs them in `startTransition` to keep the UI responsive, and propagates results or errors with fail‑fast semantics. This design unifies form APIs, server actions, and optimistic updates under a unified Action paradigm.

title: 锐评给 Claude Code 和 Codex 开发插件的体验

content: OpenAI released GPT‑5.5 Instant as the new default ChatGPT model, improving accuracy, conciseness, and personalization over GPT‑5.3 Instant. Accuracy gains include a 52.5 % drop in hallucinations for high‑risk domains, 37.3 % lower error rate on flagged conversations, and higher scores on math and science benchmarks (AIME, GPQA, MMMU‑Pro). The model now gives shorter, friendlier responses, better multimodal understanding, and can recall user history for tailored advice. A “Memory Sources” panel shows which memories were used. The update is available via the web, API, and soon on mobile and other tiers. OpenAI is also hosting a launch party for GPT‑5.5, scheduled for May 5 at its San Francisco headquarters, with invitations distributed to thousands of users.

title: 2026年当下AI领域最核心的理念是这个
content: The article argues that AI is shifting from dialog interfaces to autonomous self‑optimizing cycles. Key ideas include: autonomous component optimization via projects like Autoresearch, a move toward intent‑based engineering that requires clear, measurable goals, increased transparency that exposes most “knowledge work” as non‑core scaffolding, and the public dissemination of expert knowledge, letting AI absorb and preserve it. These changes enable rapid self‑improvement loops—define goals, AI acts, record data, learn from failures, update SOPs—leading to faster progress and a new scarcity of clear‑intent formulation.

title: 对 Symantec Ghost 的 GHO 格式研究
content: Studies the GHO format used by Symantec Ghost. A 1 TB GHO backup could not be restored due to memory limits. The structure includes a 512‑byte header, track, partition, and compressed data blocks (32 KB each) with a custom LZ77‑like compression. Record types mark the start, continuation across files, and end of the archive. Code for parsing is open‑source on GitHub.

title: 2026 05 06 HackerNews
content: Chrome silently downloads and installs a 4 GB Gemini Nano model without user consent, automatically redownloading if deleted. This raises privacy, compliance, and environmental concerns. Microsoft Edge stores all saved passwords in memory in plain text. State‑based health‑insurer websites have leaked citizenship and race data via misconfigured pixels. title: 开发了一个管理本地开发环境的软件
content: A developer created a cross‑platform GUI (mise_gui) using Flutter to simplify local development environment management with the command‑line tool mise. The application displays an overview of installed tools, versions, and project‑specific overrides, and lets users view, install, switch, upgrade, or remove tools through a preview of the underlying mise commands. It also offers configuration editing with diff previews and automatically locates the mise binary if not in the GUI’s PATH. The project is open source on GitHub.

These capabilities, combined with global information sharing, enable more sophisticated, efficient and harder‑to‑detect biological attacks.

title: Multimodal RAG with the Gemini API File Search Tool: A Developer Guide
content: Gemini’s File Search tool now supports multimodal retrieval via the gemini‑embedding‑2 model, allowing images and text to be indexed in the same store. Users create a store, upload PDFs and images, and query the store through the API; the model returns grounded answers with citations, including image IDs that can be downloaded. The tool offers managed vector storage, cost‑effective embeddings, native image search, custom metadata filtering, structured output, and detailed chunking options. It enables use cases like visual product search, technical diagram retrieval, and integrated photo‑document analysis.

The post highlights related work on structured prompt development, feedback loops in AI programming, and debates over powerful cloud models versus locally run open models. It also notes Apple’s low AI spending and the broader issue of data privacy and ownership. Finally, it discusses how AI tools may struggle with producing internally quality code, a central concern for future development.
